status_values.canonical: Primary public metric for current research workflow.
status_values.diagnostic: Interpretation/audit support field; not necessarily primary endpoint.
status_values.legacy: Backward compatibility field; not recommended as new primary endpoint.

registry_semantics.notes: This registry documents project-defined metric families and export semantics. Direct external-package primitive calls are not listed unless wrapped in project logic.

pure_observation_w_i.citation: implementation-defined; requires sensitivity analysis or bibliographic justification

pure_observation_w_s.citation: implementation-defined; requires sensitivity analysis or bibliographic justification

phase2_harmonic_weight.description: Corpus-level harmonic model-density weight applied at compile stage.

phase2_inharmonic_weight.description: Corpus-level inharmonic model-density weight applied at compile stage.
phase2_inharmonic_weight.citation: implementation-defined; requires sensitivity analysis or bibliographic justification

phase2_subbass_weight.description: Corpus-level subbass model-density weight applied at compile stage.

density_metric_raw.description: Canonical weighted density metric using model/corpus or per-note weights.
density_metric_raw.citation: implementation-defined; requires sensitivity analysis or bibliographic justification

density_metric_normalized.citation: implementation-defined; requires sensitivity analysis or bibliographic justification

density_metric_raw_per_note_balance.citation: implementation-defined; requires sensitivity analysis or bibliographic justification

note_density_final.description: Principled per-note scalar density: component_harmonic_energy_ratio*harmonic_density_sum + component_inharmonic_energy_ratio*inharmonic_density_sum + component_subbass_energy_ratio*subbass_density_sum. Combines the GUI amplitude weight function (already applied inside each *_density_sum) with the per-note MEASURED component energy ratios (Component_Balance), NOT the Bayesian adaptive weights. Absolute (not corpus-normalized); RMS-referenced input audio makes it comparable across instruments only under an identical analysis profile. NaN propagates if any of the six inputs is NaN.
note_density_final.citation: implementation-defined; requires sensitivity analysis or bibliographic justification

note_density_final_ci_low.description: Lower bound of the per-note bootstrap confidence interval for note_density_final (transform-aware; resamples per-partial contributions AND recomputes component energy ratios inside each resample). NaN when the per-note workbook is unreadable.

note_density_final_ci_high.description: Upper bound of the per-note bootstrap confidence interval for note_density_final. See note_density_final_ci_low.

note_density_final_rel_uncertainty.description: Relative uncertainty of note_density_final (bootstrap std / |point estimate|). NaN if point ~ 0 or workbook unreadable.

note_density_final_uncertainty_sources.description: Provenance token for the note_density_final uncertainty: 'partials+ratios' (full UQ: per-partial sampling AND component-ratio uncertainty propagated jointly), 'partials' (ratios held fixed), or 'unavailable'.

EWSD_score_total.description: Strict Effective Weighted Spectral Density (EWSD-R v18): sum over H/I/S compartments of (analysis_ratio * weighted_band_sum * N_eff/N). Recomputed in Stage 3 from per-note component spectra; requires Harmonic + Inharmonic sheets. NaN when per-note workbooks are absent.

EWSD_score_acoustic_balanced.description: Acoustic-balanced EWSD companion: same inputs as EWSD_score_total but concentration penalty exponent alpha=0.5. Preferred for cross-instrument bibliographic distance.

ewsd_primary_analysis_eligible.description: Thesis safety gate for EWSD rows: True only for individual_exact mode, H/I/S ratios summing to ~1, finite EWSD, positive component count, no warning, parsed note, and thesis-safe weight function.

ewsd_merge_status.description: Stage 3 merge provenance token (merged_individual_exact, no_per_note_workbooks_found, note_not_in_ewsd_output, ewsd_computation_failed).

EWSD_score_acoustic_balanced_ci_low.description: Bootstrap 95% lower bound for EWSD_score_acoustic_balanced (partials + H/I/S ratios resampled).

ewsd_uncertainty_sources.description: EWSD bootstrap provenance: partials+ratios, partials, or unavailable.

ewsd_stage3_version.description: Embedded EWSD core version tag (currently EWSD-R v18).

density_weights_source.description: Weight provenance token (phase2 profile vs per-note ratio).
density_weights_source.citation: implementation-defined; requires sensitivity analysis or bibliographic justification

tristimulus_3_high_harmonics_5_plus.description: Combined harmonic amplitude share of orders >=5.

spectral_flatness.description: Geometric mean over arithmetic mean of power spectrum.
